title: Ukumelana Ngokungezona Izikhali, ngeminyaka yawo-1970 kanye no-1980: Kusukela ku-Black Consciousness Kuya ku-UDF
subject: History

sources.title: Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)

slides.title: Ukumelana Ngokungezona Izikhali, ngeminyaka yawo-1970 no-1980
slides.lead: Indlela ukumelana kwangaphakathi okwavuselela ngayo abaphikisi bobandlululo - kusukela ku-Black Consciousness (Ukuzazi Kwabamnyama) naseSoweto kuya ku-UDF nasezimeni eziphuthumayo (states of emergency).

media.alt: Inqindi elifumbethwe liphakama ngenhla komugqa oqinile ovundlile, olibonisa ukumelana kwabantu abaningi nobandlululo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='20' height='72' rx='5' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='140' y='44' width='40' height='26' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='138' y='40' width='9' height='20' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='150' y='36' width='9' height='24' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='162' y='38' width='9' height='22' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='40' y='150' width='240' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka isigqi seyunithi. Ngeminyaka yawo-1960 ukuvinjelwa kwe-ANC ne-PAC, i-Rivonia Trial kanye nezigwebo ezinde zejele kwashiya ukumelana kwangaphakathi kubuthakathaka. Lesi sifundo silandelela indlela, kusukela ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1960 kuqhubeke, igagasi elisha lokumelana elavuka ngalo lisuka ngaphakathi ezweni: kuqala imibono (Black Consciousness), bese kuvuka intsha (1976), abasebenzi abahleliwe (izinyunyana), kanye nasekugcineni umkhankaso wabantu abaningi (i-UDF) uhulumeni owazama ukuwuchoboza ngokubusa ngesimo esiphuthumayo. Cela abafundi baqhubeke bebuza: ubani omelana, kanjani, futhi uhulumeni usabela kanjani?

slides.title: 'Ishumi leminyaka elithule' nokuphela kwalo
slides.lead: Ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1960 ubandlululo lwalubukeka luqinile - kodwa ukumelana kwakubuya kabusha ngokuthulile.

blocks.text: Ngemva kwe-Sharpeville (1960) uhulumeni wavimbela **ANC** ne-**PAC**, wavalela ejele abaholi abanjengo-Nelson Mandela, futhi waphoqa izinhlangano zenkululeko ukuba ziye ekudingisweni nasemangweni. Umbhikisho osobala wabantu abaningi ngaphakathi ezweni wachotshozwa, futhi iminyaka yawo-1960 kwesinye isikhathi ibizwa ngokuthi 'ishumi leminyaka elithule'.

items: Imithetho ecindezelayo yayivumela ukuvalelwa ngaphandle kokuqulwa kwecala kanye nokuvinjelwa kwezishoshovu.
Umnotho wakhula, kodwa abantu abamnyama bahlala bekhishwe emandleni ezombusazwe.
Ukumelana okusha kwakuzokhula kusuka kubafundi, abasebenzi nemiphakathi kunezinhlangano ezazivinjelwe.

slides.notes: Misa ukuqhubeka nokushintsha. Abafundi sebehlangabezane ne-Sharpeville nokuphenduka empini ehlomile eyunithini edlule. Gcizelela ukuthi ukuvuselelwa kweminyaka yawo-1970 kwakuyindaba yezinhlangano ezintsha ezazisebenza ngokusemthethweni noma ngokungathi sina ngaphakathi eNingizimu Afrika, ngoba izinhlangano ezasungulwayo zazivinjelwe. Lokhu kubeka isizathu sokuthi kungani i-Black Consciousness nezinyunyana ezizimele zabaluleka kangaka.

slides.title: I-Black Consciousness kanye no-Steve Biko
slides.lead: 'Isikhali esinamandla kunazo zonke ezandleni zomcindezeli yingqondo yocindezelwe.'

blocks.text: Bekhathazwe yipolitiki yabafundi eyayiholwa abamhlophe, abafundi abamnyama bazihlukanisa ukuze basungule **South African Students' Organisation (SASO)** ngo-1969, u-**Steve Biko** engumongameli wayo wokuqala. Ifilosofi yabo, **i-Black Consciousness (BC)**, yakhuthaza abantu abamnyama baseNingizimu Afrika ukuba banqabe umqondo wokuzidelela, baziqhenye ngobunikazi babo, futhi bazikhulule ngokwengqondo ngaphambi kokuba bazikhulule ngokwezombusazwe.

items: 'Umnyama' wachazwa ngokwezombusazwe ukuba uhlanganise abantu base-Afrika, abaMdaka nabaseNdiya abacindezelwe ubandlululo.
I-Black People's Convention (1972) yasakaza imibono ye-BC emiphakathini ngezinhlelo zokuzisiza.
I-BC yanika isizukulwane esisha ukuzethemba nolimi lokumelana.

media.alt: Ikhanda elenziwe ngobuciko libhekise eceleni linelanga eliphumayo ngaphakathi, elibonisa inkululeko yengqondo nokuziqhenya.

slides.notes: I-SASO yasungulwa ngo-1968 futhi yethulwa ngokusemthethweni ngo-1969 e-Turfloop; gcina ugcizelela u-1969 njengonyaka wokwethulwa. Chaza i-BC njengenkululeko yengqondo: ukuziqhenya, ukuzimela nobunye phakathi kwabacindezelwe. Qaphela ukuchazwa kabusha ngokwezombusazwe kwegama elithi 'umnyama' ukuze kwakhiwe ubunikazi obubanzi. Dweba umehluko nezinhlangano zangaphambili: i-BC yayisebenza obala nangokusemthethweni ekuqaleni, okuyingxenye yesizathu sokuthi yasabalala ngokushesha emakhempasini nasemitholampilo nasezinhlelweni zomphakathi.

slides.title: Ukuvukela kwaseSoweto
slides.lead: Umbhikisho wabafundi ophikisana nesiBhunu ezikoleni waba ukuvukela okwazwelonke.

blocks.text: Ngo-1974 uhulumeni wayala ukuthi **isiBhunu** sisetshenziswe ngokulinganayo nesiNgisi njengolimi lokufundisa ezikoleni zabantu abamnyama. Abafundi, abaningi babo ababethonywe yi-Black Consciousness, babona lokhu 'njengolimi lomcindezeli'. Ngomhla ka-**16 Juni 1976** izinkulungwane zabafundi baseSoweto bamasha ngokuthula; amaphoyisa adubula, futhi umbhikisho waqhuma waba ukuvukela okwasakazeka ezweni lonke.

items: Izibalo ezisemthethweni zabeka abafileyo ku-23 ngosuku lokuqala; izilinganiso zakamuva zibalulwa ngokuphakeme kakhulu.
Isithombe sika-Hector Pieterson ofayo saba yizindaba ezinkulu emhlabeni wonke.
Izinkulungwane zabasha babalekela ekudingisweni bajoyina izinhlangano zenkululeko.

media.alt: Ulayini wabafundi abamashayo abaphethe ipulakhadi eliphakeme.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='24' width='54' height='30' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='176' y='54' width='4' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='40' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='72' width='14' height='42'/><circle cx='84' cy='54' r='12'/><rect x='77' y='68' width='14' height='46'/><circle cx='128' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='121' y='72' width='14' height='42'/></g><rect x='24' y='126' width='196' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha udlame ngokunesibopho: gxila enhlosweni yabafundi yokuthula nasekusetshenzisweni kwamandla ngokweqile. Isibalo sabafileyo siyaphikiswa - beka u-23 osemthethweni wosuku lokuqala kanti uphawula izilinganiso eziphakeme zezazi-mlando, ugweme inombolo eyodwa 'egcina'. Gcizelela imiphumela: ukugxekwa kwamazwe ngamazwe, ukwanda kwabajoyini be-ANC ne-PAC ekudingisweni, kanye nokufika kwentsha njengamandla amakhulu emzabalazweni. Xhumanisa nemfundo yeBantu Education yeyunithi yeBanga 9.

slides.title: Ukushona kuka-Biko nokuvinjelwa kuka-1977
slides.lead: Uhulumeni wazama ukubulala umbono ngokuthulisa izinhlangano zawo.

blocks.text: U-**Steve Biko** wavalelwa washonela esitokisini samaphoyisa ngomhla ka-**12 Septhemba 1977** ngenxa yamanxeba awathola ngesikhathi ephenywa. Ukushona kwakhe kwabangela ukukhala kwamazwe ngamazwe. Ngomhla ka-**19 Okthoba 1977** uhulumeni wavimbela cishe **izinhlangano ezingu-18 ze-Black Consciousness nezihlobene**, kuhlanganisa i-SASO ne-Black People's Convention, futhi wavala amaphephandaba ayebike ngale nhlangano.

items: U-Biko waba uphawu lomhlaba wonke lokumelana nolonya lobandlululo.
Ukuvimbela izinhlangano akuzange kubhubhise imibono ezaziyisakazile.
Izishoshovu eziningi zaphinda zahlangana ngezinyunyana, amasonto nezinhlangano zomphakathi.

media.alt: Ikhandlela elivutha ngokuzinzile eceleni kweketanga eliphukile.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='72' y='70' width='20' height='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M82 46 q10 12 0 22 q-10 -10 0 -22 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 74 a14 14 0 1 1 0 28 a14 14 0 0 1 0 -28 Z' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M138 88 a14 14 0 1 0 12 0' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Uphenyo lokushona kuka-Biko lwathola ukuthi akekho onecala, okwaba ubufakazi bokungabi nabulungiswa kobandlululo; ungakuphawula lokhu ugcine imininingwane ilingana neminyaka yabafundi. Iphuzu elibalulekile lokuhlaziya: ucindezelo lwalungavimbela izinhlangano futhi lubulale abaholi, kodwa i-Black Consciousness yayisivele iwushintshile umqondo wesizukulwane, futhi labo bantu bawuthwala umzabalazo bawuyisa ezinhlakeni ezintsha. Lokhu kuxhumanisa kahle nokukhula kwezinyunyana.

slides.title: Amandla abasebenzi abahleliwe
slides.lead: Iziteleka nezinyunyana kwaguqula amandla omnotho aba ucindezelo lwezombusazwe.

blocks.text: **Iziteleka zaseThekwini zango-1973** - izinkulungwane zabasebenzi ababeka phansi amathuluzi - zabonisa amandla okusebenza ngokubambisana futhi zaqubula igagasi elisha lezinyunyana ezizimele zabantu abamnyama. Lezi zakhula phakathi neshumi leminyaka, zakha i-**Federation of South African Trade Unions (FOSATU)** ngo-1979, kwathi ngoDisemba 1985 kwakheka enkulu kakhulu i-**Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)**.

items: I-COSATU yethulwa ngomhla ka-1 Disemba 1985 no-Elijah Barayi engumongameli no-Jay Naidoo engunobhala jikelele.
Izinyunyana zaxhumanisa izidingo zamaholo nempi ebanzi yokulwa nobandlululo.
Iziteleka nokuhlala ekhaya (stayaways) kwaba yizikhali ezinamandla ngeminyaka yawo-1980.

media.alt: Isakhiwo semboni sinabalingiswa abangabasebenzi abame ndawonye phambi kwaso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='50' width='74' height='70' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='166' y='30' width='14' height='24' fill='#5c6b40'/><rect x='160' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='186' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='72' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='65' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='104' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='97' y='84' width='14' height='36'/></g><rect x='20' y='120' width='204' height='8' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi kungani izinyunyana zabaluleka: ubandlululo lwaluncike emsebenzini wabantu abamnyama, ngakho abasebenzi abahleliwe babengalimaza umnotho baphoqe izingxoxo. I-FOSATU (1979) yakha isiko lezinhlanga ezihlukene, lasezindaweni zomsebenzi; i-COSATU (1985) yahlanganisa ubulungu obukhulu kakhulu futhi yazibandakanya obala nomzabalazo obanzi wenkululeko. Xhumanisa nesikhathi se-UDF: izinyunyana nezinhlangano zomphakathi zazizwana ngokwengeziwe ekuhlaleni ekhaya nasekuboycottheni.

slides.title: IPhalamende Elinezindlu Ezintathu (Tricameral Parliament)
slides.lead: 'Uguquko' olwanika abanye ivoti kanti lukhipha iningi.

blocks.text: Ngo-1983 uhulumeni wethula umthethosisekelo omusha owakha i-**Tricameral Parliament** enezindlu ezintathu ezihlukene: eyodwa yabamhlophe, eyodwa yabaMdaka neyodwa yabaseNdiya - kodwa **kungekho ukumelwa nhlobo kweningi labantu base-Afrika**. Yayiklanywe ukuba yehlukanise abacindezelwe futhi inike ubandlululo ubuso obamukelekayo kakhudlwana.

items: Amandla angempela ahlala ezandleni zabamhlophe ngohlelo olucindezelayo.
Abantu base-Afrika kwakumele basebenzise 'amalungelo' kuphela eBantustans.
Esikhundleni sokwehlukanisa abaphikisi, kwabahlanganisa embhikishweni.

media.alt: Amabhokisi amathathu ezindlu ahlukene, amabili amancane elilodwa likhulu futhi libusa, neningi lishiywe ngaphandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='20' y='40' width='56' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='86' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='142' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='206' cy='84' r='9'/><circle cx='222' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='210' cy='104' r='9'/></g><rect x='198' y='116' width='40' height='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='16' y='108' width='176' height='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yisizathu esibalulekile sokwakheka kwe-UDF. Beka iphuzu lokuhlaziya ngokucacile: uhlelo lwe-Tricameral lwaluyisu lokuthenga nokwehlukanisa - thenga izikhulu zabaMdaka nabaseNdiya, uhlukanise abantu base-Afrika eBantustans. Buza abafundi ukuthi kungani ukukhipha iningi kwenza 'uguquko' luba iphutha lezombusazwe. Kwanika ukumelana isikhalo esisodwa esihlanganisayo.

slides.title: I-United Democratic Front

blocks.text: Ngomhla ka-**20 Agasti 1983** cishe abantu abangu-10,000 bahlangana e-**Mitchells Plain**, eKapa, ukuze bethule i-**United Democratic Front (UDF)**. Bephendula isimemo esivela ku-Mfundisi u-**Allan Boesak** sokuphikisana nomthethosisekelo we-Tricameral, izithunywa ezivela ezinhlanganweni ezingaba ngu-**565 ezazibambisene** - izinhlangano zomphakathi, izinyunyana, amasonto, izinhlangano zabafundi nezabesifazane - bajoyina umfelandawonye owodwa obanzi.

items: I-UDF yazibandakanya obala nemibono yeFreedom Charter ne-ANC eyayisekudingisweni.
Abaholi babebandakanya u-Albertina Sisulu, u-Archie Gumede no-Popo Molefe.
Yaxhumanisa ama-boycott, ukuhlala ekhaya nemikhankaso yabantu abaningi ezweni lonke.

media.alt: Abalingiswa abaningi abancane behlangene ndawonye ngaphansi kwebhena elilodwa, kubonisa umfelandawonye ohlangene.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='22' width='100' height='30' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='118' y='52' width='4' height='30' fill='#5c1414'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='66' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='92' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='120' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='148' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='174' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='200' cy='96' r='9'/></g><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='53' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='79' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='107' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='135' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='163' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='189' cy='118' r='9'/></g><rect x='24' y='132' width='196' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: I-UDF iyingxenye ephakathi yokumelana kwangaphakathi kweminyaka yawo-1980. Gcizelela ukwakheka kwayo - umfelandawonye wamalunga azimele amakhulu kunenhlangano eyodwa - okwakwenza kwaba nzima kuhulumeni ukuyivimbela. Yayingacwasi ngokobuhlanga futhi yayisebenzisa iFreedom Charter, isebenza njengomlingani wangaphakathi we-ANC eyayisekudingisweni. Qaphela amagama abaholi ukuze wandise isithombe ungagcini kubantu ababodwa ababili, kuhlanganisa nabaholi besifazane abanjengo-Albertina Sisulu.

slides.title: Ukumelana ngokungezona izikhali, 1969-1986

events.label: U-Biko ushonela esitokisini; izinhlangano ze-BC ziyavinjelwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lokhu ukuhlanganisa ngaphambi kwezingqwembe zokugcina zokuhlaziya. Cela abafundi balandelele iphethini: imibono (1969), abasebenzi (1973), intsha (1976), ucindezelo (1977), umfelandawonye wabantu abaningi (1983), ukubhekana nokubusa ngesimo esiphuthumayo (1985-86). Veza ukuthi isigaba ngasinye sakhelwe phezu kwesedlule - umnyakazo wakhula waba banzi wahleleka kangcono ngisho naphansi kocindezelo olukhulu.

slides.title: Izimo eziphuthumayo, 1985-1986
slides.lead: Njengoba amalokishi evukela, uhulumeni wabusa ngommemezelo wesimo esiphuthumayo.

blocks.text: NgoJanuwari 1985 i-ANC eyayisekudingisweni yacela abantu ukuba benze ubandlululo **'lungabuseki' (ungovernable)**. Amalokishi aqhuma ngama-boycott erenti nawabathengi, ama-boycott ezikole, ukuhlala ekhaya, nokusungulwa kwamakomiti asemgwaqweni. Uhulumeni waphendula nge-**simo esiphuthumayo esiyingxenye ngomhla ka-21 Julayi 1985**, kanye **nesimo esiphuthumayo sikazwelonke ngomhla ka-12 Juni 1986**.

items: Izinkulungwane zavalelwa ngaphandle kokuqulwa kwecala, kubandakanya izishoshovu eziningi ze-UDF.
Ibutho lempi lahlala emalokishini futhi imithombo yezindaba yavinjelwa kakhulu.
Ucindezelo lwanciphisa ukuvukela kodwa lwehluleka ukubuyisela ukwamukeleka kobandlululo.

media.alt: Isithunzi semoto ehlomele phambi kwezindlu zaselokishini ngemuva komgoqo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='70' width='34' height='30'/><rect x='190' y='74' width='34' height='26'/></g><path d='M150 70 l17 -14 l17 14 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M190 74 l17 -12 l17 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M28 96 l14 -18 h60 l14 18 v22 h-88 Z' fill='#5c6b40'/><circle cx='48' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><circle cx='96' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='30' height='10' fill='#3f4a2c'/><rect x='20' y='130' width='204' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Isimemo 'sokungabuseki' savela esitatimendeni sika-Oliver Tambo sikaJanuwari 1985. Chaza amasu okuvukela kwabantu abaningi - ama-boycott, ukuhlala ekhaya, izinhlaka ezehlukene zaselokishini - njengeminzamo yokwenza ukuphathwa kobandlululo kuwe kusuka phansi. Bese uchaza izimo eziphuthumayo njengomzamo kahulumeni wokuchoboza lokhu ngokuvalelwa, amabutho nokuvinjelwa kwezindaba. Isifundo sokuhlaziya: amandla ayengacindezela umbhikisho okwesikhashana kodwa ajulisa inkinga yokwamukeleka eyaphoqa uhulumeni ukuba ubheke ezingxoxweni ngo-1990.

slides.title: Ama-boycott, ukuhlala ekhaya kanye nocindezelo lwamazwe ngamazwe
slides.lead: Ukumelana kwahlanganisa ucindezelo lwangaphakathi nolwangaphandle kwezwe.

blocks.heading: Ama-boycott abathengi nerenti
blocks.text: Imiphakathi yenqaba ukuthenga ezitolo ezaziphethwe abamhlophe noma ukukhokha irenti, kulimaza umnotho nezinhlaka zobandlululo zendawo.

blocks.heading: Ukuhlala ekhaya nama-boycott ezikole
blocks.text: Abasebenzi nabafundi bahoxisa umsebenzi wabo nokuya kwabo, bebonisa ukwenqatshwa okukhulu kobandlululo.

blocks.heading: Ucindezelo lwamazwe ngamazwe
blocks.text: Izijeziso zomnotho, ukuhoxiswa kwezimali zokutshala nama-boycott ezemidlalo namasiko kwahlukanisa iNingizimu Afrika phesheya.

slides.notes: Bonisa ukuthi ucindezelo lwangaphakathi nolwangaphandle lwaqinisana kanjani. Ama-boycott abathengi nerenti aguqula izinqumo zomnotho zansuku zonke zaba izikhali zezombusazwe futhi ayehlobene eduze ne-UDF nezinyunyana. Izijeziso zamazwe ngamazwe kanye ne-boycott yezemidlalo (isibonelo ukukhishwa kuma-Olympics nokuhlukaniswa kwe-cricket ne-rugby) kwakhuphula izindleko zobandlululo futhi kwakhuthaza imimoya ngaphakathi ezweni. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba balinganise ukuthi isici ngasinye sanikela kangakanani - inkulumo-mpikiswano yokuhlaziya evamile ye-FET.

slides.title: Umbono owaphila ngaphandle kokuvinjelwa
slides.lead: I-Black Consciousness yayithi inkululeko iqala engqondweni.

blocks.text: Isikhali esinamandla kunazo zonke ezandleni zomcindezeli yingqondo yocindezelwe.

Ukuqonda kuka-Biko kuchaza ukuthi kungani ukumelana kweminyaka yawo-1970 nawo-1980 kwakunamandla kangaka. Uma abantu sebekuchithile ukukholelwa ukuthi ubandlululo lwaluyimvelo noma luyahlala, awukho umyalelo wokuvimbela owawungabuyisela ngokugcwele lolo kholo. Ukuzethemba okwakhiwa yi-Black Consciousness kwadla ukuvukela kwentsha kuka-1976, izinyunyana, kanye nokuhlanganiswa kwabantu abaningi kwe-UDF.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi sicaphuno ukuhlanganisa imicu. Impikiswano eyinhloko yeyunithi: ucindezelo lwalungavimbela izinhlangano, luvalele futhi lubulale abaholi, kodwa lwalungeke luyiguqule ingqondo yezombusazwe yezigidi zabantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Cela abafundi baxhumanise isicaphuno okungenani nemicimbi emibili efundwe esifundweni (isibonelo iSoweto 1976 ne-UDF). Lokhu kwakha uhlobo lwendima esekelwe ebufakazini oluvuzwa yizindaba ze-CAPS.

slides.title: Esikufundile - nemibuzo okumele iphendulwe
slides.lead: Ukumelana kwangaphakathi kwakha kabusha kusuka emibonweni kuya esenzweni sabantu abaningi, futhi ukwamukeleka kobandlululo kwawa noma ucindezelo lwakhula.

blocks.text: Phakathi kwasekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1960 nakuphakathi neminyaka yawo-1980, ukumelana kwasuka ku-**Black Consciousness** kwaya ku-**kuvukela kuka-1976**, **ukukhula kwezinyunyana**, kanye **nokuhlanganiswa kwabantu abaningi kwe-UDF**. Uguquko lwe-Tricameral lukahulumeni nezimo zawo eziphuthumayo kwehluleka ukuzuza ukwamukeleka, kwabeka isisekelo sezingxoxo ekupheleni kweshumi leminyaka.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi i-Black Consciousness yanikela kanjani ekuvuselelweni kokumelana ngeminyaka yawo-1970. Sebenzisa ubufakazi ukusekela impendulo yakho.
Kungani i-United Democratic Front yaba uhlobo olusebenzayo kangaka lokumelana kwangaphakathi ngeminyaka yawo-1980?
'Izimo eziphuthumayo zango-1985-1986 zaqinisa ubandlululo esikhundleni sokulubuthakathaka.' Uyavuma? Xoxa ngakho.

slides.notes: Vala ngokuxhumanisa izigaba njengembangela nomphumela. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengemisebenzi esekelwe emithonjeni noma yokubhala okwengeziwe; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulingisa izitayela zendima nezindaba ze-CAPS. Umbuzo wokugcina onjengesindaba wenzelwe ukuba uphikiswane - vuza umugqa ocacile wempikiswano osekelwa ubufakazi esifundweni. Bonisa iyunithi elandelayo: izingxoxo, ukukhululwa kwe-ANC ekuvinjelweni ngo-1990, kanye nendlela eya ku-1994.
